items.title: Palantir Is Breaking The Rule Of 40—And That May Be The Bigger Story Than AI
items.summary: AI is the headline. The math might be the real story. Palantir Technologies Inc. just reported a Rule of 40 score of 145% — a software-industry yardstick that adds revenue growth to operating margin, with 40 considered the bar. Palantir didn’t just beat the benchmark, it stretched it. In software, 40% is considered healthy. Even top-tier companies land in the 60–80% range. Palantir is operating in a different zone. And it didn't get there overnight. Don't Miss: A single bad hire can set a startu

items.summary_kr: AI가 헤드라인이다. 수학이 실제 이야기일 수도 있습니다. Palantir Technologies Inc.는 방금 145%의 40점 규칙(Rule of 40)을 보고했습니다. 이는 영업 이익률에 매출 성장을 추가하는 소프트웨어 산업 척도이며 40점을 기준으로 합니다. Palantir는 단순히 승리한 것이 아닙니다.

items.summary: Apple  stock is finally on its way to hit a record, but there’s more the iPhone maker has to prove in just a few short weeks to keep investor sentiment on the up and up. items.title: The Nasdaq Is Up 3.5% This Month
items.summary: The tech-heavy index was up another 1.8% on Wednesday, bringing its month-to-date gain to 3.5%.  The index is now on pace for its best four-day start to a month since November 2024.  The tech-heavy index was also on pace for a closing high after setting an intraday record of 25,777.38.
